description:
Create a new Talon module folder named case_report at C:\Users\Docker\AppData\Roaming\talon\user\case_report\ containing a Python action file and a companion voice command file. File Explorer is currently open at the Talon user directory.

The file case_report.py must import Module and actions from the talon package, initialize mod = Module(), and define a class CaseReportActions decorated with @mod.action_class. The class must implement exactly three actions, each with a docstring:
- insert_evidence_divider() calling actions.insert("========== EVIDENCE ITEM ==========")
- insert_chain_of_custody() calling actions.insert() with this exact multi-line string:
   CHAIN OF CUSTODY
   Item Description: 
   Received From: 
   Received By: 
   Date/Time Received: 
   Storage Location: 
   Condition on Receipt: 
- insert_case_closed() calling actions.insert("[CASE STATUS: CLOSED]")

The file case_report.talon must define voice commands for 'evidence divider', 'chain of custody', and 'case closed stamp' that call user.insert_evidence_divider(), user.insert_chain_of_custody(), and user.insert_case_closed() respectively using standard Talon syntax.

Both files must be saved to C:\Users\Docker\AppData\Roaming\talon\user\case_report\.
